      参数类型为FailbackRegistry的org.apache.dubbo.registry.retry中的构造器 
      构造器和说明
      FailedRegisteredTask(URL url, FailbackRegistry registry) 
      FailedSubscribedTask(URL url, FailbackRegistry registry, NotifyListener listener)
